title: Zero-downtime add-non-null-with-backfill
prompt: Add a new non-null column `plan_code` (string) to an existing `subscriptions` table without downtime. Use the canonical three-migration pattern: (1) add as nullable, (2) backfill with a default via execute "UPDATE subscriptions SET plan_code = 'free'", (3) alter to NOT NULL. For this challenge, produce all three migrations in separate files. Files: priv/repo/migrations/20260413000000_add_plan_code_nullable.exs, priv/repo/migrations/20260413000001_backfill_plan_code.exs, priv/repo/migrations/20260413000002_make_plan_code_not_null.exs.
tier_rationale: Synthesis of three migration files with a specific ordering pattern. Hard because Sonnet typically collapses this into a single migration.
research_citation: Hashrocket — Ecto Migrations: Simple to Complex
